top_tweets.text:
I still don't think people understand what just happened with Claude Design.

Claude Design can now take you from rough idea to fully responsive, high-fidelity website design in 10 minutes.

Most builders are skipping Steps 1-3 and blaming the tool when results look generic. https://t.co/t80TynAju5
top_tweets.author: PrajwalTomar_
top_tweets.name: Prajwal Tomar
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Design 能在 10 分鐘內從粗略想法產出完整響應式高擬真網站設計，但多數使用者跳過前置步驟就直接責怪工具產出太通用。作者強調正確的使用流程至關重要。

top_tweets.text:
Tom Clancy’s Splinter Cell: Chaos Theory designer Clint Hocking says modern graphics are making stealth games harder to design because realistic lighting is more difficult for players to read.

“It gets very hard to tell what’s light, what’s shadow, what’s dark, what’s safe, https://t.co/oTj0JuC7NQ
top_tweets.author: Pirat_Nation
top_tweets.name: Pirat_Nation 🔴
top_tweets.summary_zh: 《縱橫諜海：混沌理論》設計師 Clint Hocking 指出，現代寫實光影技術反而讓潛行遊戲更難設計，因為玩家難以判讀哪裡是光、哪裡是影、哪裡安全。

top_tweets.text: Built for the AI era. ✨ Meet Neural Expressive, Gemini’s new design language featuring fluid animations, vibrant colors, updated typography, haptic feedback, and visual responses.
top_tweets.author: GeminiApp
top_tweets.name: Google Gemini
top_tweets.summary_zh: Gemini 發布專為 AI 時代設計的新設計語言 Neural Expressive，具備流暢動畫、鮮明色彩、更新字體、觸覺回饋與視覺反應等特點。

top_tweets.text: We talk about Millenial gray and how we’ve lost so much color in interior design but we don’t talk enough about the loss of TEXTURE https://t.co/2CRaR4Pzam
top_tweets.author: luusssso
top_tweets.name: lusso
top_tweets.summary_zh: 除了千禧灰與色彩流失，現代室內設計更嚴重的問題是質感（texture）的消失，這點被討論得太少。

top_tweets.text:
Be like Lenny (@lennysan)

1. Find a niche you genuinely care about
2. Obsess over creating insanely useful content for that niche
3. Build products that solve their problems better than anyone else
4. Be really nice  
5. Design a life you don’t need a vacation from https://t.co/HqpVSnJSxJ
top_tweets.author: gregisenberg
top_tweets.name: GREG ISENBERG
top_tweets.summary_zh: 以 Lenny 為例，成功方程式包括：找到真正在乎的利基、為該受眾打造極有用的內容、做出比任何人都好的解決方案產品、保持友善、設計不需要逃離的人生。

top_tweets.text:
Twitter is cool.  

But it’s 100x better when your timeline is full with people who code and build things.  

I need to connect with more founders and tech people.

If you’re into Tech, AI, Startups, Design, web dev, SaaS, or programming, say hi.
top_tweets.author: thenowhereway
top_tweets.name: Devansh
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者號召更多技術創辦人與開發者連結，認為當時間軸充滿會寫程式與做產品的人時，Twitter 的價值會提升 100 倍。

top_tweets.text:

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
